name: Ultralight
description: Lightweight, GPU-accelerated HTML rendering engine for native C++ desktop and game apps — Electron alternative.

seo.title: Ultralight — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Ultralight: Lightweight, GPU-accelerated HTML rendering engine for native C++ desktop and game apps — Electron alternative.

when_to_use: Lightweight HTML UI for a C++ desktop game or tool
GPU-accelerated WebView embedded in a native application
Electron alternative with minimal binary size for desktop apps
In-app browser panel for a high-performance native desktop app
HTML/CSS-based UI rendered inside a game engine using Ultralight

pros: Good fit for games and embedded UI
cons: Commercial licensing required above small use
Web-std support partial — not full Chromium
review.verdict: The right call when you need HTML UI in a C++ game or tool without shipping Chromium — if licensing fits budget.
review.best_for: Game studios and native C++ teams embedding HTML UIs with tight size budgets
review.not_for: Web developers wanting full Chromium parity and open-source licensing
